message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Authorization Code or Implicit Flow

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Oauth" as Oauth
participant "Login Endpoint" as LoginEndpoint
participant "Consent Endpoint" as ConsentEndpoint

== Open page ==
Client -> Oauth: Initiate authorize code or implicit flow
activate Oauth
Oauth -> Oauth: No user session (not authenticated)
Oauth -> LoginEndpoint: Redirect to login endpoint with <login_challenge>
note right of LoginEndpoint: GET https://<LOGIN_ENDPOINT>/login?login_challenge=7bb518c4eec2454dbb289f5fdb4c0ee2

== Login ==
Client -> LoginEndpoint: Input user/password
activate LoginEndpoint
LoginEndpoint -> LoginEndpoint: Verify user/password
LoginEndpoint --> Oauth: Fetch login request info with <login_challenge>
note right of LoginEndpoint: GET http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/login?login_challenge=<challenge>
LoginEndpoint -> LoginEndpoint: PUT http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/login/accept?login_challenge=<challenge>\n{\n  "acr": "string",\n  "context": {},\n  "force_subject_identifier": "string",\n  "remember": true,\n  "remember_for": 3600,\n  "subject": "string"\n}
LoginEndpoint --> Oauth: Accept login
LoginEndpoint --> Oauth: Return redirect url
deactivate LoginEndpoint
Oauth -> Client: Redirect

== Consent ==
Oauth -> Oauth: First time that client asks user for permission
Oauth -> ConsentEndpoint: Redirect with <consent_challenge>
activate ConsentEndpoint
ConsentEndpoint -> ConsentEndpoint: Asking users permission to grant application access
ConsentEndpoint --> Oauth: Fetch consent info
note right of ConsentEndpoint: GET http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/consent?consent_challenge=<challenge>
ConsentEndpoint -> ConsentEndpoint: PUT http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/consent/accept?consent_challenge=<challenge>\n{\n  "grant_scope": ["openid", "offline_access"],\n  "handled_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",\n  "session": {\n    "access_token": {\n      "foo": "This field will be available when introspecting the Access Token"\n    },\n    "id_token": {\n      "bar": "This field will be available as a claim in the ID Token"\n    }\n  }\n}
ConsentEndpoint --> Oauth: Accept
ConsentEndpoint --> Oauth: Return redirect url
deactivate ConsentEndpoint
Oauth -> Client: Redirect page

@enduml
```
